subject: WM-0150 review: changes_requested
body: High: rejected duplicate PrioritizeLampWork mutates authoritative lamp order/pawn marker before returning rejected; High: validateBasis ignores target/map/reservation/job version mismatches and accepts stale reviewed basis; Medium: schema-v2 batch rejection still emits legacy accepted/reason instead of ADR-0012 batchAccepted/batchReason.
